title: Implement overlay GC command, hook installer, and gitignore update
description:
## Scope
- Add overlay gc CLI command and hook installer.
- Install git hooks for post-merge and post-checkout (and post-rewrite if needed).
- Update .gitignore to ignore project/.overlay.

## Definition of Done
- overlay gc command available in both runtimes and hooks install cleanly.
creator: ryan.porter
